description: A wardrobe essential, a belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. wac by wrangler perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with jeans, casual shoes and a colourful tee or shirt.Length: 95 cmMade of canvas and genuine leather for durabilityLoop clasp for a snug FitLeather at the buckle and tail of the belt and branding embossed on the tail end for style CareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
